_readme: Audit log for roadmap.html - the header version badge and its modal render from this file. Newest first; dates are UTC ISO-8601. Append an entry with a semver bump for any change that alters what the roadmap page shows (see AGENTS.md, Key files).

changes: #28 (gsm.safety v1.0) Development → Review: RC1 PR #39 fully green with 9/9 safety.viz renderers bound, corrected ECG demo data, and refreshed evidence — merge+tag is the remaining gate
#41 (shared view selector) delivered to production in safety.viz v1.4.1; closing comment posted, issue close pending
#44 filed (Backlog): Status-page unreleased-commits view + dev-branch policy
New Status page (status.html) in the site nav: package status for the six portfolio repos — latest release, open milestones, open issues/PRs, dev-vs-main drift, and 90-day PR activity by user
Roadmap intro links across to package status: the roadmap tracks what is planned, the status page what has shipped
Status is rendered by Gilead-BioStats/gh.dash from scripts/status-repos.csv on every site deploy (including the daily cron), so it is never more than a day stale
Tasks column now reads the GitHub sub-issues rollup (subIssuesSummary), falling back to inline checklists only for pre-sub-issue requirements
New Updated column: per-row last-activity date
Open issues in the Released group are flagged with a 'still open' pill instead of silently passing as done
Attention-first section order: Development → Review → Design → Requirement Gathering → Backlog
Intro links the executive-overview report (2026-07-21) — the narrative companion to this table
#36 (QT Safety Explorer) → Released — Phase 1 shipped in safety.viz v1.4.0, #37 tracks Phase 2 (decision session 2026-07-19)
#41 (shared view selector) → Released — PR #78 merged by @jwildfire, evidence live on the dev tier; issue close pending @jwildfire
Decision records posted: #34 D1/D2/D6 ratified (GitHub prerequisite), #35 D1–D3 resolved, #18 Q1–Q4 resolved → advancing to Design
Autonomous overnight session (2026-07-18): four deliverables run to their human gates — nothing merged
New requirement filed: Shared view selector across safety.viz renderers (hub #41, board = Development), with impl sub-issue safety.viz#76
gsm.safety v1.0.0 RC1 advanced to the merge+tag gate (safety.viz re-pinned to v1.4.0; hub #28)
Requirement matrices refreshed — hep-explorer (incl. composite HEP-COMP rows) + a new qt-explorer Phase-1 matrix (obot.agent PR #28)
Model-attribution correction: hub #36 and safety.viz#68 updated Fable 5 → Opus 4.8
safety.viz v1.4.0 released — QT Safety Explorer Phase 1 (first cardiac-safety renderer), hep-explorer composite plot, Gallery dropdown, and header-nav icon polish shipped to production
QT Safety Explorer (hub #36) advanced to Development — Phase 1 delivered/released; the phased requirement is now on the board
QT Safety Explorer Phase 2 filed as requirement hub #37 (Requirement Gathering) — QTcI, multi-interval, drill-down, hysteresis, guided ICH-E14 workflow, moxifloxacin arm
Three backlog requirements filed for the remaining improvement ideas: benefit-risk forest plot (hub #38), benefit-risk value tree (hub #39), recurrent-AE analysis (hub #40)

Report published: safety-graphics improvement requirements & feasibility — five colleague ideas (hep composite plot, renal finish/integrate, QT explorer, benefit-risk tools, recurrent AE) scoped into actionable requirements with a feasibility read; all four source documents reviewed

QT Safety Explorer filed as requirement hub #36 (Requirement Gathering) — ICH-E14 cardiac-safety renderer ported from SafetyGraphics/qtexplorer; Phase-1 implementation safety.viz#68 linked as a sub-issue
Hep-explorer composite plot filed as implementation safety.viz#67 — baseline-referenced eDISH (Tesfaldet et al., Drug Safety 2024)
nepExplorer requirement (hub #35) added to the project board at Requirement Gathering (wrapup delta sweep found it filed but missing from the board)
sv#63 (evidence-page requirement text, shipped in safety.viz v1.3.1) linked as a sub-issue of hub #29

nepExplorer migration (hub #35) filed to Requirement Gathering — KDIGO kidney-safety explorer as a new safety.viz renderer, sibling to hep-explorer (#30); assessment complete (phased GO), framed as ~1–2 ultracode sessions
Session hub (hub #24) moved to Review — delivered via obot.agent v0.2.0 'the session framework' (live dashboard + wrapup report; lean bookends, scratchpad heartbeat, session-spawn shipped alongside)
safety.viz v1.3 (hub #29) moved to Development — first renderer slice (ae-explorer) in review as safety.viz#60 / PR #61
safety.viz v1.2 (hub #30) moved to Released — v1.2.0 shipped with eDISH + clinical guide
gsm.safety v1.0 (hub #28) moved to Development — RC1 staged as gsm.safety PR #39
Blog series (hub #22) moved to Development — diary #5 'Introducing safety.viz' published

Two requirements filed at the 2026-07-12 wrapup: #32 (hep-explorer user guide, Word to HTML, v1.3 release companion) and #33 (legacy renderer issue migration research) — both at Requirement Gathering, 2026q3
#34 (design discussion: GitHub's role in open.gismo v1.0, D1/D2/D6) added at Backlog — gates the open.gismo requirement filings

#30 (safety.viz v1.3 hep-explorer migration) Requirement Gathering -> Development, milestone 2026q4 -> 2026q3: the coordinated core landed overnight as safety.viz#44 (draft, in review); deferred functionality filed as sub-issues safety.viz#45-#50, port tooling gaps as safety.viz#51 under #29

Four requirements filed at the session-2 wrapup roadmap-prep (every next-session priority now has a linked requirement): #28 gsm.safety v1.0 full adoption of safety.viz v1.1 (all six widgets + QCThat; sub-issues gsm.safety#27/#28; gsm.safety#30 stays under #2), #29 safety.viz v1.2 remaining renderers + explorer demo environment (sub-issues safety.viz#32/#33/#41), #30 safety.viz v1.3 hep-explorer full module port, #31 roadmap transparency (absorbs the usage-audit Tier-2 rules + the obot.agent three-jobs orchestration vision; sub-issue obot.agent#26) — all Requirement Gathering
New convention started: release notes cite their hub requirements ('Requirements delivered:' line) — retro-applied to safety.viz v1.0.0/v1.1.0 and obot.agent v0.1.0

Move #25 (canonical demo data) Review -> Development at the session-2 wrapup: its open implementation issue safety.viz#35 (gsm.datasim follow-on refactor) is actively in development; the shipped migration (#37/PR #38) is live on /dev/
Board hygiene riding the wrapup: closed safety.viz#39 (histogram overview, PR #40 merged) -> Released; new safety.viz#41 (design-mockups agent follow-up) added to the board at Backlog

Retro-log #24 (session hub) Requirement Gathering -> Development — design approved with sub-issues linked and implementation PR obot.agent#24 open; the move itself happened earlier on 2026-07-11 without an entry

Close #1 (safety.viz library) as delivered — v1.0.0 shipped 2026-07-11 22:31 EDT (v0.1.0 same morning); Status stays Released (the roadmap-usage audit's Released -> Review step collapses since the issue closes immediately); v1.0-cycle sub-issues linked (safety.viz #14/#15/#17/#19/#20/#21/#24-#27/#29); open remainder carries forward standalone (safety.viz #32/#33/#39 + demo-data scope under #25)

Move #17 (obot.agent overlay) Review -> Released and close — v0.1.0 shipped 2026-07-11 with sign-off; obot.agent#18 linked as a sub-issue; obot.agent#14/#15 carry forward at Backlog, staying linked as historical sub-issues
Move #23 (hub skills swap, closed 2026-07-11) Development -> Released

Board hygiene from the roadmap-usage audit (tier-1 sweep, approved by @jwildfire): all 21 no-status items staged — closed issues and merged PRs -> Released (obot.agent #12/#13; safety.viz #20/#21/#24-#27/#29/#34/#37 + PRs #22/#23/#30/#31), open carry-forwards -> Backlog (obot.agent #14/#15; safety.viz #32/#33), safety.viz #35 -> Development (demo-data pipeline actively in a worktree); stale corrections: closed safety.viz #14/#19 Backlog -> Released; safety.viz #39 (v1.1 histogram overview, draft PR #40) added at Development
Sub-issue links completed: safety.viz #35 -> #25; Tasks checklists in #17 and #21 synced to sub-issue state (safety.viz #2/#5-#8 and #37 keep their existing parents — one parent per issue)

Move #17 (obot.agent overlay) Requirement Gathering -> Review — design published with D1-D4 resolved (17_design.html), five sub-issues linked, three stacked implementation PRs in review; repo renamed safety.agent -> obot.agent
Add #23 (hub skills swap, Development, 2026q3) to the board — requirement-lifecycle skills adopted from the archived clone; session-skill handoff pending obot.agent#16
Add #24 (session hub — live dashboard + wrapup reports, Requirement Gathering) to the board — new requirement filed by the safety.viz v1 ultraplan session
Move #2 (Safety Histogram pilot) and #21 (safety.viz documentation site) to Released — safety.viz v0.1.0 shipped 2026-07-11 with the root site live; evidence comments on both issues
Add safety.viz #14 (shift plot, Backlog), #15 and #17 (staging-review fixes, Released), and #19 (histogram binning QC, Backlog) to the board — the v1.0-cycle items

Move #1 (safety.viz library) and #3 (obot GitHub App) from Review to Released — #1’s scoped deliverable (library scaffold) shipped to main, #3’s acceptance verified live via both obotclaw token paths; #3’s stale Tasks placeholder replaced with the as-built summary
Move safety.viz #7 (site build) and #8 (publishing) to Released — PRs #11/#12 merged 2026-07-10, site live on the /dev/ tier
Milestones: #21 (safety.viz documentation site) → 2026q3 (was unset); #10 (R/Pharma keynote deck) → 2026q4, off the untimed backlog (keynote is date-locked to October)
Add gsm.safety #27 (QCThat framework, Backlog), #28 (widget thumbnail gallery, Review), and PR #29 (Review) to the board
Display all timestamps (footer, audit-log dates) in US Eastern Time instead of UTC; same change applied to the news footer and homepage metrics stamp

Add #21 (safety.viz documentation site) and #22 (R/Pharma developer-diary blog series) to the board; move #1 (safety.viz library) and #3 (obot GitHub App) to Review — changes deployed with the 2026-07-08 diary entry, logged retroactively at the 2026-07-09 wrapup
Remove the Dashboard link from the site nav — the dashboard page was retired; its key metrics now live at the bottom of the homepage
Move #3 (obot GitHub App) from Design to Development — design approved and both acceptance paths green on 2026-07-04; only §7 credential retirement remains
Add a version badge to the header that opens this audit log
Initial roadmap page: Requirement issues grouped by lifecycle stage, generated from GitHub issues and the obot Roadmap project (hub migration, #7)
